result.stdout:
Usage: pxd-anim-import --file <json-file> --die <target-id> --die <target-id>

      --file, -f=VALUE       Animation JSON file (default stdin)
      --die, -d=VALUE        Target dice ID's
      --all, -a              Target all dice
      --list-dice-ids        List discovered dice IDs (no import)
      --help, -h, -?         Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: pxd-anim-import --file <json-file> --die <target-id> --die <target-id>

      --file, -f=VALUE       Animation JSON file (default stdin)
      --die, -d=VALUE        Target dice ID's
      --all, -a              Target all dice
      --list-dice-ids        List discovered dice IDs (no import)
      --help, -h, -?         Show help message
